ab: humicuwa’ ku kaal sawni’?
en: A: How’s the weather today?

ab: gihaaq tikay ku kaal, kapayux manubuwag cu qusiya’ ka makilux.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.

ab: humicuwa’ ku kaal sawni’?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: makilux tikay ku kaal, kapayux manubuwag cu qusiya’.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.

ab: humicuwa’ ku kaal i lata’?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: rahwal a wagi’, laxi ku umungi’ maras cu tataumuk.
ch: B:太陽很大，要記得防曬用具。
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.

ab: humicuwa’ ku kaal i lata’?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: payux hamhum, ukas wagi’ i kaal.
en: There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.

ab: paphicuwa’ ku kaal i casan?
en: How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: pakaukas wagi’ i casan, payux hamhum, rahuwal bayhu.
ch: B:明天沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.

ab: humicuwa’ ku kaal cuku riax ka yani?
en: How was the weather that day?

ab: gihaaq tikay kaal cuku riax ka hani, pasiyatu’ cu siyatu’ ka kehma i mausa’ lata’.
ch: B:這天有點冷，出門要穿厚衣服。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.

ab: paphicuwa’ ku kaal i riax hahangiqan?
en: How’s the weather on the weekend?

ab: pakbalayq ku kaal i riax hahangiqan.
en: It will be sunny on the weekend.

ab: paquwalax i riax ka yani qu?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: pakbalayq ku kaal cku riax ka yani, iqaat paquwalax.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.

ab: paquwalax a kaal cku riax ka yani qu?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: uwal, paquwalax cuku riax ka yani.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.

ab: qumuwalax kahani qu?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: masuwat la, pakahtu a wagi’ la.
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.

ab: qumuwalax kahani qu?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: qumuwalax la, ini’ kuwing aras cu hawsuwa.
en: It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.

ab: qumuwalax i lata’ qu?
en: Is it raining outside?

ab: ini’ quwalax kahani, paquwalax i minaneq qaliyan, aras cu hawsuwa i patgi lata’.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.

ab: pakgihaaq i qamisan pilag a kaal qu?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: uwal, paktala’tu’ i kaal pilag, kapayux masiyatu’.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: pakakilux i gabagan kaal kahani qu?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: uwal, pakakilux cubalay i gabagan, kapayux manubuwag cu qusiya’.
ch: B:是，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.

ab: balayq su’ ku gabagan ka tikay qu?
en: Do you like spring?

ab: balayq mu cubalay i gabagan ka tikay, halhul a kaal.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.

ab: balayq su’ ku qamisan ka tikay qu?
en: Do you like autumn?

ab: aqeh mu ku qamisan ka tikay, puyux a mamati’ ka bayhu.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
